notes: Polk County FL — PublicSoft/Kofile BrowserView Official Records SPA at apps.polkcountyclerk.net/browserviewor/. Reverse-engineered 2026-06-10 from the SPA's archived JS bundle (live host firewall/geo-fenced — TCP-unreachable from the Wave-1 build egress 49.36.190.212). Pure-HTTP adapter at adapters/publicsoft_or_adapter.py. Flow: GET api/search/clientinfo (learns encryptData) -> POST api/search with RSA-PKCS1v1.5+base64 encrypted criteria (JSEncrypt-compatible, 1024-bit key embedded above) -> rows[] (row[0] carries _total_rows/_start_row/_end_row/_max_rows). Direct retrieval: {FileNumber} to api/search; api/document by {ID|Book/PageNumber/BookType}; api/pdf for server-side PDF. NO reCAPTCHA / NO disclaimer in the SPA flow — only gate is the host firewall (Wave-2 egress concern). WAVE-2 #1 TASK: capture one live api/search 200 body to confirm per-row field names (result_field_map is a tolerant best-guess) and the exact DEED doctype code (api/document/doctypes). Test subjects: BUNKER (WILLIAM JOSEPH + JULIE CHAMBERS, 6836 HAMPSHIRE BLVD LAKELAND); co-subject RUTH BRITO BAUTISTA (1001 PRADO GRANDE ST HAINES CITY).
